race.comment: FLAXLANDS (8) returned in fine fashion with a solid Gold Coast win and will have taken some confidence from that breakthrough victory. Winning hoop Lloyd sticks in the saddle and can go back-to-back without surprising. WAYBURN (1) is one from one over this course and distance and will strip fitter second-up from the break. Gets 2kg off with the claim and looms as the main danger. BOOMSHANKA (7) had been plying her trade in harder races before the spell and will appreciate the drop back in company here. Can run a race while fresh. LUCKY ARTIE (5) finally got the maiden out of the way at the latest effort and may go right on with the job now. In the mix. BOLD AS BRASS (4) has placed three of four around this circuit and can earn some minor money again.
